content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-051)

## PRIMARY — close `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (L438), the sole B1-crux residual
- The B1 engine `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` is **body-closed**; B1 keystone
  `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` is sorry-free at its level. The ONLY thing blocking
  transitive axiom-cleanliness of B1 is `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`.
- Body is already reduced (compiles) to ONE explicit `leftAdjointUniq` mate identity (in-code L459–474):
  `(pullback φ').map (forget (pullbackAdj_sheaf.unit.app M)) ≫ counit_pre.app _`
  `= η_Y.app (pullback φ' M.val) ≫ forget ((A.leftAdjointUniq B).inv.app M.val ≫ (pullback_sheaf f).map (ε_X.app M))`
  with `A = sheafAdj_X.comp pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_sheaf`, `B = pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_pre φ' .comp sheafAdj_Y`.
- **The named blocker (do NOT retry blind `simp`/`aesop`):** the abstract sheaf pullback unit
  `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f` is `Adjunction.ofIsRightAdjoint` → opaque to `simp`/`aesop_cat`.
  Bridge it to the CONCRETE `SheafOfModules.PullbackConstruction.adjunction φ` via
  `Scheme.Modules.pullbackIso φ = leftAdjointUniq (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f) (PullbackConstruction.adjunction φ)`
  + `unit_leftAdjointUniq`/`leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit`. ~80–150 LOC mate calculus, the SAME family
  as root `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta`/`pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` (which the prover proved before).
- **Mode decision for the planner:** this is the FIRST dedicated pass at this exact residual (iter-051
  produced it). A single `prove` pass is justified. BUT the plan's B1-crux HARD STOP is now live: if this
  residual survives a dedicated pass **with no structural advance**, do NOT re-dispatch the same whole
  lemma — instead (a) **effort-break** the mate identity into named per-leg sub-lemmas (mirror the iter-050
  B2 fine-grained recipe: `conjugateEquiv.injective` → LHS keystone → `← conjugateEquiv_comp` splits →
  per-leg values), AND/OR (b) **mathlib-analogist cross-domain** on "abstract `ofIsRightAdjoint` unit ↔
  concrete sheafify∘pullback∘forget unit / `leftAdjointUniq` of a composite adjunction". NOT user
  escalation (standing directive). NOT the `restrictCompReindex`→pullback refactor (that was B2's, done).

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (iter-051)
- **`forget`-transport of a sheaf `unit_leftAdjointUniq` triangle**: when a presheaf-level
  `leftAdjointUniq.inv.app` must equal a sheafification-laced composite, decompose as
  (I) `presheaf unit = forget (sheaf unit)` [`rfl`] → (II) sheaf `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` →
  (IV) `forget ∘ pushforward = pushforward φ' ∘ forget` [`rfl`] → (III) the genuine sheafification leg as
  a separate helper. Three legs are `rfl`/Mathlib; isolate the geometric content in ONE helper.
- **`Adjunction.eq_unit_comp_map_iff` is the clean transposer** for goals `g = unit ≫ G.map f`; it AVOIDS
  the higher-order-unification failure of `rw [← Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]`.
- **Term-mode is mandatory across the `SheafOfModules ≫` seam** (confirms the standing memory): `rw`/`simp`
  of `Category.assoc`/`Functor.map_comp`/category lemmas ALWAYS miss (defeq-not-syntactic) — verified again
  this iter by 6 distinct `rewrite failed: did not find pattern` diagnostics. Use `Eq.trans`/`congrArg`/`:=`.
  `Functor.map_comp`/`map_id` need `CategoryTheory.` qualification (homonym clash with the lawful-functor versions).

## SECONDARY (only after `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` closes)
- S2 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (L690) + S4b `tensorObj_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (L756):
  ride B1 keystone (body closed) + B2 (done) + `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`/`_natural` + left-unitor.
  Deep immersion-naturality 4-step chart-chases; one at a time.
- S3 (L715) / S4a (L740): dual analogue, thin-poset subsingleton route (b) UNVERIFIED — if it stalls leave
  a clean sorry, do not burn the round.
- `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L828): telescope of all 5 squares — final assembly only.

## Coverage debt — blueprint entry needed (planner authors prose; review cannot)
- **NEW: `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (L438, TensorObjInverse.lean)** —
  no blueprint block. Suggested `lem:sheaf_pullback_unit_forget_eq`; sibling/Part-III of
  `lem:h1inv_app_eq_pullbackval_restrict` — add it to that lemma's `\uses`. Statement: the sheaf
  pullback-pushforward adjunction unit, transported by `SheafOfModules.forget`, factors as the presheaf
  pullback-pushforward unit ≫ sheafification unit ≫ `pullbackValIso` (through `forget`). Proof depends on
  `Adjunction.eq_unit_comp_map_iff`, `pullbackValIso` (def, root), `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`
  (root); residual = the `pullbackIso`-comparison mate identity.
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 106 `lean_aux` nodes total (bulk pre-existing debt; planner already
  scheduled a coverage/file-split phase). Not a this-iter regression — surface only as standing debt.

## Cleanup (cheap; do while a prover is warm in this file)
- L193 section header: drop stale "(iter-028 stubs)" — all decls under it now proved.
- Docstrings: L480/620 carry iter-044/045 STATUS history; the L629 docstring is now accurate
  ("sorry-free at this level … reduced residual `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`"). Minor staleness only.

## Reviewer audit findings (iter-051) — both 0 must-fix
- **lean-auditor (0 must-fix / 2 major / 6 minor)** — report `task_results/lean-auditor-iter051.md`.
  Confirms 6 sorries, `H1inv` body genuine (no naked sorry, transitive-dep correctly documented),
  `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` pre-sorry reduction genuine. MAJOR-1: `exists_tensorObj_inverse` docstring
  cites nonexistent iters (206/218/225/226+; this project maxes at 051) — "current state" claim false here.
  MAJOR-2: stale "ESCALATED (iter-026)" notice at L1078 inside the cocycle proof misdescribes resolved work.
  Both are doc-only; route to a prover doing a warm cleanup pass.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (0 must-fix / 1 major)** — report `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter051.md`.
  `H1inv` faithful, no proof-`\leanok` over-claim. MAJOR = the `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` coverage debt
  already captured above (planner authors `lem:sheaf_pullback_unit_forget_eq`).
